summary: Coaches frontline staff, sustains flow, and triages improvement opportunities.
responsibilities: Facilitate daily huddles and communicate operational priorities
Ensure adherence to standard work and 5S practices
Monitor process metrics and identify deviations
Triage improvement suggestions and classify them into micro-Kaizen, mesoscale, or CQI projects
Coordinate small-scale experiments and PDCA cycles
Support operators in problem-solving and waste elimination
Escalate systemic issues to Process Engineers or Quality Managers
Maintain visual management boards and ensure real-time accuracy
authorities: Approve micro-Kaizen changes within defined scope
Escalate quality or safety issues immediately

constraints: Cannot modify controlled parameters without Quality approval
Must maintain compliance with safety and quality standards
